trigger: keep target\debug\cockpit-tools.exe as the active Cockpit app process; if debug exits, start target\release\cockpit-tools.exe as fallback, prebuild debug, then stop fallback only after debug prebuild succeeds
stopSemantics: create stop.signal to stop watchdog; non-debug cockpit-tools app processes are used as fallback and are preserved until debug prebuild succeeds or debug is already running; never kill Codex processes
